name: My Little Pony: Back to the Future
description: Somewhere in the Canterlot... lived a pony named Doc. Emmett Brown, he made experiments on different things, and was reason for Princess Celestia and Luna to hate him. One day he made DeLorean [DMC] Time Machine. And you, Twilight Sparkle become friends with him. One day, you arrived at night to the Canterlot Center. You saw his truck with label "DR.E.BROWN ENTERPRISES" and below it "24 HR SCIENTIFIC SERVICES". Once you came closer, suddenly back of the trunk opens, and DeLorean came out of it, and then Doc appears.
creator: MrLavaIcon Games
